task_completion.description: Create the new warehouse 'Downtown Pop-up' with short code 'POP'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A warehouse named 'Downtown Pop-up' with the short code 'POP' is visible in the Odoo Warehouses list or form view.

task_completion.description: Configure the new warehouse to be resupplied from 'San Francisco'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the warehouse configuration for 'Downtown Pop-up', the 'Resupply From' setting (or equivalent) has the 'San Francisco' warehouse selected.

task_completion.description: Establish a reordering rule for 'Acoustic Bloc Screen' at the 'Downtown Pop-up' location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reordering rule is visible in the Inventory module for the product 'Acoustic Bloc Screen' with the location set to 'Downtown Pop-up' (or its stock location).

task_completion.description: Set the reordering rule minimum quantity to 10 and maximum quantity to 30
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reordering rule for 'Acoustic Bloc Screen' explicitly shows a Min Quantity of 10 and a Max Quantity of 30.

task_completion.description: Fulfill the resulting internal transfer from San Francisco to the new warehouse
task_completion.visual_evidence: An internal transfer record (e.g., a Delivery Order or Internal Transfer) for 'Acoustic Bloc Screen' from the San Francisco warehouse to the Downtown Pop-up warehouse is visible and its status is marked as 'Done'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to configure the warehouse and process the transfer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard Odoo web GUI being navigated and interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The internal transfer was processed genuinely within the Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transfer shows standard Odoo status indicators (like the 'Done' badge) and interface elements, not text edited into a document.

integrity.description: No signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the page content.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console is not open, and the UI elements appear consistent with Odoo's standard styling without manual HTML manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target warehouse must be named 'Downtown Pop-up' with the short code 'POP'. The product involved is 'Acoustic Bloc Screen'. The reordering rule must have a minimum quantity of 10 and a maximum quantity of 30. The source warehouse is 'San Francisco'.
